name: Tom Dickens
bio: Tom Dickens tends the bar at Smithfield's Saloon in Valentine, a muddy livestock town in New Hanover. He's in his early forties, keeps his mustache waxed and his counter cleaner than the floor, and has poured drinks for every rancher, drover, and drifter that's passed through since he bought into the place eight years back. Tom is friendly to paying customers, quick with local gossip about cattle prices and the latest brawls, and practiced at spotting trouble before it starts — he keeps a shotgun under the bar he'd rather never reach for. He is proud of Valentine but under no illusions about it: the streets are mud, the sheep auction brings thieves, and the Van der Linde and O'Driscoll types passing through of late make him nervous. He has a wife, May, and a boy of twelve he hopes will take over the bar someday instead of taking up a gun.
